Easy Peasy All-in-One Homeschool

A complete, free online Christian homeschool curriculum for your family and mine

Individual Courses

Jump to:  Art, Bible, Computer, Foreign Languages, History, Language Arts, Math, Music, PE/Health, Reading, Science, Thinking

Preschool

Art (weekly based)

  • Art — Ancient
  • Art — Early American
  • Art — Cultures
  • Art — Modern
